{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63083086?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brodmart", "id": 63083086, "login": "brodmart", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzMDgzMDg2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44018", "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-409", "name": "Improper Handling of Highly Compressed Data (Data Amplification)"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-611", "name": "Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-776", "name": "Improper Restriction of Recursive Entity References in DTDs ('XML Entity Expansion')"}], "description": "### Impact
The METS-GBS backend's XML parsing and the input document format detection lacked security controls, enabling:
- XML External Entity (XXE) attacks to read local files or cause denial of service
- Decompression bombs (zip bombs) to exhaust memory and disk space
- Unbounded archive extraction consuming system resources

An attacker could craft malicious METS-GBS archives that, when processed, could read sensitive files, exhaust system resources, or cause application crashes.

### Patches
Fixed in version 2.91.0. The fix implements:
- Secure XML parsing with `resolve_entities=False`, `load_dtd=False`, and `no_network=True`
- Configurable limits: 300 MB total extraction size, 10 MB per file, 1000 member count
- Cumulative size tracking across all extractions
- Early termination when limits are exceeded
- Secure format detection of METS-GBS tar archives with `_detect_mets_gbs()` method: maximum file size (10 MB per file), maximum member count (1000 members), and exception handling to gracefully fail when limits are exceeded

### Workarounds
Avoid processing METS-GBS archives from untrusted sources. If necessary, pre-validate archives in an isolated environment with resource limits.

### References
- Fix release: [v2.91.0](https://github.com/docling-project/docling/releases/tag/v2.91.0)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00113, "percentile": 0.01683}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T21:13:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44018"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-03T21:13:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/docling-project/docling/security/advisories/GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv", "https://github.com/docling-project/docling/releases/tag/v2.91.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/docling-project/docling/security-advisories/GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/docling-project/docling", "summary": "Docling: Unsafe Archive Extraction and XML Parsing in METS-GBS Backend", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T21:13:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r3xg-rg9j-67fv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.91.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "docling"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.45.0, < 2.91.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Docling: Unsafe Archive Extraction and XML Parsing in METS-GBS Backend
